other_observers: Maggie Boswell, Joey Kellner, Bill Maynard, Brandon Percival and many others.; Joe Roller, Glen Walbeck, Cole Wild found the bird.
description: A small gull; considerably smaller than Ring-billed Gulls which were present. Almost completely white above, except for a little black round the eye and a very small ear patch which was well behind the eye. The underwings were almost all a dark gray; not black. The all white tail was very noticeably wedge shaped, which was easily seen when the bird banked and turned. The bill was small and appeared to be black; too distant to see the color of the legs.Behaviors: Flying over the center of Cherry Creek Res and very regularly going down to the surface to pick a morsel up. Would stay for just a few seconds and then take off again. 3 or 4 times the bird sat on the surface for several minutes at a time.Call: None heard.Plumage: Basic
